<!-- Generated by releases/scripts/generate-plugin-reference.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->
Utility for determining whether live channel data should be considered stale.

# Signature

```js
export function isChannelDataStale(channelData, nowUnixSeconds = (Date.now() / 1000))
```

# Behavior

- Uses `channel_data.stale_timeout` and `channel_data.timestamp`.
- Returns `false` when stale timeout is missing or invalid.

- Public React client package source.
